review_title: Great feedback tool for website development
description: It's been fantastic! Our first project testing the tool was for a large website rebuild. The non-technical client picked it up right away. They were able to provide simple to complex comments easily. I've been testing many of the popular feedback tools recently, and Feedbucket offers very good features and service at a fair price. My team is very happy with it, and our customers find it easy to use. We've found our feedback tool.
author: Eric L.
pros: It has a user-friendly interface for our customers to provide feedback or comments on their new websites in the final stages of development. Each comment logs a screenshot and their note.
cons: In our dashboard where we could see the full list of comments for a project, there was no easy way to refer to an individual comment offline. I contacted support via chat, and 1 day later, they had added the comment ID to each comment, thus solving my only con.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The best feedback tool I have used in our agency - ever.
description: I’ve used plenty of feedback tools over the years, including SureFeedback (Project Huddle), Marker.io and others. Most of them either got bloated or stopped improving. Feedbucket, on the other hand, just works - clean, fast, and simple. It’s genuinely one of the easiest tools I’ve integrated. Works perfectly across WordPress, Shopify and even our Vue.js site, and connects seamlessly with ClickUp. No setup headaches, no bugs, no fluff - just a solid, reliable tool. Best part? Clients actually use it. Feedback comes in clearly, projects move faster, and our whole process runs smoother. I signed up for the yearly plan (which I rarely ever do), that says it all.
author: Hassan I.
pros: Honestly super easy to use, no clutter or complexity. Integrates perfectly with WordPress, Shopify, and Vue.js. Works flawlessly with ClickUp. The interface is super clean & fast which is what we wanted.
cons: Honestly, nothing at the moment. (If I had to nitpick, maybe that clients actually use it… so now we get more feedback to action!!)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Game Changer for Client Feedback
description: Overall experience has been fantastic, both in terms of the product itself and in terms of the customer support.
author: James R.
pros: This product has made collecting our clients' website feedback significantly easier! The integration with our Project Management software is a game changer as well. We no longer have to move from one platform to another to manage change requests. Additionally, the customer service is next level. Friendly and knowledgeable staff are happy to help guide you towards the best subscription for your needs.
cons: I would like a bit more flexibility in defining what constitutes a resolved task from our PM system, but this is not a show stopper.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A must-have for web agencies
description: Overall, feedbucket works really well and we did not run into any bug. Customer support is next level here!
author: Philip S.
pros: This makes communication about feedback on a website or web-app super easy. Directly implemented on the website as a widget with a lot of useful feedback options (foto, video, highlighting).
cons: You need to add and later remove a script to your website. In comparison to other tools that display websites inside another application, this takes more time.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I give it 5 stars.
description: This platform has bidirectional integration: It syncs with popular project management tools like Asana, Jira, Trello, ClickUp, Notion, and Slack, which has been very helpful. My overall experience has been excellent.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: One of the features I loved about this platform is that I can communicate with customers directly, without needing to log in to Feedbucket.
cons: I was having some problems, so I contacted technical support via email. They responded very quickly and provided a solution to my problem. I recommend this platform.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Amazon tool, well thought-out design and functionality
description: Very pleasant, they've been very response to our questions and the onboarding was a breeze compared to competitors.
author: Len V.
pros: We’ve tried many different feedback tools, but Feedbucket really stands out. The user interface is clean and intuitive, the pricing is straightforward, and it’s packed with all the features we need. The biggest win for us is that it doesn’t require a browser extension. That makes it incredibly easy for our customers to use, they can submit feedback instantly, and Feedbucket captures all the right information (screenshots, console errors, browser data, etc.) automatically. It just works, reliably and beautifully, makes feedback collection a breeze and integrates with our existing tools (e.g. Asana).
cons: Honestly, there’s very little to dislike. If anything, we’d love to an api so we can automatically register sites in our pipeline, but that’s a minor detail compared to how well everything else works.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: FeedBucket FTW
description: Using FeedBucket is easy to use for both my clients and myself. Set up is incredibly easy, and the WordPress integration allows me to specify its availability for logged in users -- this allows me to use it on live websites, where the public won't see the FeedBucket tools, but clients can simply login and start leaving feedback.
author: Wendell H.
pros: My primary goal is to make it easy for my clients to submit feedback on the websites I build for them. By making it easy for them, I'm rewarded with happy clients that actually enjoy providing feedback. The UI is also very easy for me to use and I love the various integrations, e.g. Slack and Asana, which improves my workflow so I can get more work done in less time.
cons: Seriously, I cannot think of any deal-breaking problems with FeedBucket. It has been an amazing tool and my only regret is that I didn't find it sooner.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: We moved from Marker.io and we're not looking back!
description: From the very beginning, [sensitive content hidden] and his team have been phenomenal and I'm really excited to continue working with the team going forward!
author: Craig M.
pros: Feedbucket allows for our customers to seamlessly give us feedback for their websites. This is such a high quality and polished tool. It helps us elevate the value of our product for the end user.
cons: Initially, we had some features from Marker.io that weren't present in FeedBucket (namely a specific feature regarding Asana Integrations). I spoke with [sensitive content hidden] regarding the justification for inclusion and he identified a timeframe for the addition of these features and the team have absolutely surpassed our expectations! Thanks so much!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A Brilliant Tool That Simplifies Client Feedback – Loved by Our Team and Clients Alike
description: Feedbucket has become an essential part of our web development workflow at RubyWeb. It bridges the gap between clients and developers by making it simple to point out exactly what needs to be changed on a live site. The clarity it brings to project communication has significantly reduced revisions and turnaround time. Our clients frequently comment on how easy it is to give feedback now — many of them even ask what tool we're using because they love the experience. We’ve tried other feedback systems in the past, but none have matched Feedbucket for simplicity and impact.
author: Martin S.
pros: What we love most about Feedbucket is how incredibly easy it is for both our internal team and clients to use. The interface is clean and intuitive, which makes the whole feedback process smooth and efficient. Clients don’t need to be tech-savvy to submit comments or highlight issues, and our devs love how neatly everything is organised in one place. It saves us tons of back-and-forth emails. The customer support is also excellent — quick to respond, helpful, and open to feedback.
cons: Honestly, nothing at this stage. Or nothing I can think of right now. We have not run into any noteworthy issues to date.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: A Critical Tool for our Web Agency Feedback & QA
description: We continue to love the service. It has streamlined our QA process across multiple client sites, making it seamless for clients to point to specific areas and enter change requests directly. The proactive support is a major standout.
author: John M.
pros: The deep integration with project management tools and the fact that clients don't need to install anything. It allows us to manage all feedback in one place where our team already works, preventing "notification overload" in other platforms like Notion.
cons: Early on, some key settings (like query-string triggers) felt a bit buried and could accidentally be overwritten by browser autocompletes, but the team has already addressed this by hardening those settings and improving the dashboard visibility.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Amazing tool for gathering feedback
author: David A.
pros: It makes it extremely easy for our clients and QA team to provide feedback that includes all the necessary details, including screenshots, videos, along with device and console information.
cons: The roadmap addresses our concerns, so it's only a matter of time that improvement to tagging will be available, which is our only request.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Feedback
description: Very good!
author: Mini V.
pros: Very easy to use, customerfriendly.Good way for us in implementations of projects. Good to have the possibility to add tasks in automatically.
cons: Nothing yet..
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Très bon outil de feedback
author: Arnaud V.
pros: Il y a beaucoup d'outils de feedback sur le marché mais Feedbucket coche toutes les cases ! Ce que j'apprécie le plus : la possibilité depuis le widget de feedback de voir les autres bugs remontés par les utilisateurs et les commentaires sur les tickets. Ca change vraiment la donne et je ne l'ai vu que sur des outils beaucoup plus chers !
cons: L'écran listant les bugs pourrait peut-être gagner en fonctionnalités (modifications en lot par ex)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Moved from USERBACK, wont look back!
description: Excellent product, been waiting for an alternative to USERBACK for a while now!
author: Ben S.
pros: The price compared to it's competitors, the first party Clickup connector, the fact that it can be triggered only on query strings, has attachments, screenshots and video recording.
cons: Mobile experience could be better, wish there was a minimize feature to hide the UI.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Love the product, hugely helpful in building SAAS products
description: Easy to use, this product has saved us a huge amount of time and has improved the overall quality of our product.
author: Ricky G.
pros: Easy to set up, easy to use, both from a vendor and user perspective, and great integration into ClickUp
cons: High Price, for a small company bootstrapping our product development, this is a pricey subscription
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Great tool - fantastic for feedback gathering
description: Loved using it, great service, customer support and overall experience
author: Sophie S.
pros: Loved how easy it was to use, and the multiple ways you could use it
cons: Not much! Was just quite expensive for a small business to use
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: A Must Have Tool for Collecting Personal Feedback
author: Somil G.
pros: Our primary goal is to collect personal user feedback when they observe any anomaly in our dashboard, and Feedbucket features are right at the point. The Feedbucket interface for collecting feedback using screenshots and leaving a note on top of that is incredibly remarkable. Setup and onboarding were incredibly easy, and we went LIVE with Feedbucket in minutes.
cons: Nothing as such. We loved the overall product.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: So much easier that screenshots and email tag
author: Isaac R.
pros: We've been managing our client feedback like a caveman for the last few years. After some compelling recommendations by other Feedbucket users, I decided to try to modernize this step in our process. [sensitive content hidden] has been a pleasure to work with and the platform is super polished.
cons: None so far! Support has been very responsive and answered our questions straight away during integration.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Feedbucket is exactly what we were looking for.
description: For a while, I struggled with buggy tools. When I found Feedbucket, I was immediately impressed with the ease of use and reliability of the third-party integrations.
author: Mark T.
pros: Feedbucket is very easy to set up. What I find most impressive with it is how quickly it sends tasks over to Asana and how reliable it is in that functionality.
cons: The only thing I could see as an improvement is some ability to embed a project task list in my own client portal on my agency website so my clients could see the open tasks in their client portal.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Simple yet sophisticated tool for website feedback
description: I am a huge fan of the tool and technical support. It provides a seamless workflow and saves me so much time and effort deciphering feedback from clients--totally eliminates the need for a shared Google doc or email threads with screenshots!
author: Anna J.
pros: Feedbucket is super easy to set up and integrate with existing systems for issue tracking and client feedback (I mostly use Notion). It's easy for clients to use on their own without creating an account, even the technologically challenged folks. It gave me everything I needed for designing & developing custom WordPress sites for clients with multiple stakeholders and collaborators. In one single comment you can make a detailed marked up of a screenshot, write comments, attach files, see browser/device information, and lots more.
cons: The only time I ran into an issue Feedbucket support really came through in attentive troubleshooting. They were able to identify the problem (on my end not theirs) and helped me solve it before my client noticed.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Simple but effective
description: So far I can not fault this in any ways. Great value for money and will save countless hours management customer feedback on projects
author: Richard W.
pros: As a company it is incredibly easy to implement on multiple sites and integrate into 3rd party software. You can have a site on Feedbuck and integrated in a matter of minutes. From a user point of view it is simple and intuitive to use and not convoluted.
cons: A few very minor things based around comment styling (use of colours etc) but I know this is being looked at for future development.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Feedbucket is a game changer
description: Our overall experience has been excellent, we dont have any complaints and Feedbucket has helped us free up so much time during our website development revisions.
author: Conal B.
pros: Feedbucket is super user friendly for us and our clients. The integration between Asana means that we almost never have to open feedbucket itself but can manage feedback all from within Asana
cons: Feedback tools could have the ability to use different colors and line thicknesses. Comments left on feedback should be allowed to include attachments Asana to Feedbucket should be able to bring over Asana comment images and assets It would be very nice if there was a customer facing Feedbucket portal
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very good Feedbacktool
author: Stefan K.
pros: Easy to use and reliable. Good support if needed
cons: Lack of customization options. No easy way to change placement to bottom for example. You have to use custom code for this.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: You’ve tried the rest – this is the winner!
description: We've probably purchased, used or tested the majority of tools on the market for getting website feedback and Feedbucket has to be the best!It's super simple to set up and gathering text feedback, image uploads, or video is a breeze. There's no need for browser extensions (that confuse your clients). It has superb two way integration with a whole suite of tools (which most other tools don't have).If you're looking for a way to get client feedback on a DEV or LIVE site straight into your task tool - this is it.Clients can even see the feedback they submitted, and when it's resolved right on their website. Great work guys!
author: Dave G.
pros: The simplicity of setting it up and configuring for each client site.The ease of use for the clients to submit feedback.
cons: The only con I did have has just been released as a feature - way to go!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great tool that saves time - outstanding support
description: So far no problems and everything we expected was met or implemented.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The simplicity with which we can now carry out the testing phase of new websites. We save time and at the same time have in the direction of the customer a professional software that enhances our services.
cons: Since the software is new, not all possible features or integrations are available yet, but since the customer service is very dedicated, that will surely come. Therefore, we have no negative opinions. Only the fact that the branding of the box is only possible in the most expensive tariff, we do not like so well.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
